title: UNIAN is launching a new project - "Unbreakable Business" - in which...

description: UNIAN is launching a new project - "Unbreakable Business" - in which our special correspondent Yevgeny Cherevko will talk about Ukrainian businessmen working despite the problems and cataclysms caused by the war - up to the destruction of production facilities and resources. At the same time, many indomitable Ukrainian businessmen still do not forget to support the military, veterans and immigrants,...
description_en: UNIAN is launching a new project - "Unbreakable Business" - in which our special correspondent Yevgeny Cherevko will talk about Ukrainian businessmen working despite the problems and cataclysms caused by the war - up to the destruction of production facilities and resources. At the same time, many indomitable Ukrainian businessmen still do not forget to support the military, veterans and immigrants,...
description_uk: УНІАН запускает новый проект - «Незламний Бізнес» - в котором наш специальный корреспондент Евгений Черевко расскажет про украинских предпринимателей, работающих несмотря на причиненные войной проблемы и катаклизмы - вплоть до уничтожения производственных мощностей и ресурсов. При этом, многие несокрушимые украинские бизнесмены еще и не забывают поддерживать военных, ветеранов и переселенцев,...

title: ⛽️Belarusian gasoline went to Russia in record volumes. But there is...
title_en: ⛽️Belarusian gasoline went to Russia in record volumes. But there is...
title_uk: ⛽️Білоруський бензин пішов до Росії в рекордних обсягах. Але є...
description: ⛽️Belarusian gasoline went to Russia in record volumes. But there is a nuance. In the first 25 days of June, Belarus delivered 141,000 tons of gasoline to the Russian Federation, which is 2.4 times more than in the whole of May. A year ago, deliveries in general were almost imperceptible - only about a thousand tons per June. In order to help the Russian market, Minsk even redirected the fuel it had previously sent to the countries of Central Asia. True, there is...
description_en: ⛽️Belarusian gasoline went to Russia in record volumes. But there is a nuance. In the first 25 days of June, Belarus delivered 141,000 tons of gasoline to the Russian Federation, which is 2.4 times more than in the whole of May. A year ago, deliveries in general were almost imperceptible - only about a thousand tons per June. In order to help the Russian market, Minsk even redirected the fuel it had previously sent to the countries of Central Asia. True, there is...
description_uk: ⛽️Белорусский бензин пошел в россию рекордными объемами. Но есть нюанс За первые 25 дней июня Беларусь поставила в рф 141 тысячу тонн бензина — это в 2,4 раза больше, чем за весь май. Год назад поставки вообще были почти незаметными — всего около тысячи тонн за июнь. Чтобы помочь российскому рынку, Минск даже перенаправил топливо, которое ранее отправлял в страны Центральной Азии. Правда, есть...

title: Ballistic missile launch detected
title_en: Ballistic missile launch detected
title_uk: Виявлено запуск балістичної ракети
description: Spoke with the Prime Minister of Sweden. I am grateful to Ulf for his support and for a clear position regarding the Russian war against Ukraine, against our people. The key is, of course, air defense. Now we can see that the Russians are betting on ballistic strikes, combined strikes, jet "shahedis". Defending against this is the key to denying Russia the ability to drag out the war. Of course, we talked with Ulf about things that can...
description_en: Spoke with the Prime Minister of Sweden. I am grateful to Ulf for his support and for a clear position regarding the Russian war against Ukraine, against our people. The key is, of course, air defense. Now we can see that the Russians are betting on ballistic strikes, combined strikes, jet "shahedis". Defending against this is the key to denying Russia the ability to drag out the war. Of course, we talked with Ulf about things that can...
description_uk: Говорив з Премʼєр-міністром Швеції. Вдячний Ульфу за підтримку і за чітку позицію щодо російської війни проти України, проти наших людей. Ключове – це, звісно, ППО. Зараз ми бачимо, що росіяни роблять ставку на удари балістикою, комбіновані удари, реактивні «шахеди». Захист від цього – це ключ, щоб позбавити Росію можливості затягувати війну. Звісно, ми проговорили з Ульфом речі, які можна...

title: Explosions reported
title_en: Explosions reported
title_uk: Повідомляється про вибухи
description: 🤯A man detonated a grenade during a document check in the Odessa region. The police report that they stopped the moped driver for violating the traffic rules, and during the check they found out that he is in the SZH. After that, the man took out a grenade and began to threaten, and after a few moments an explosion thundered. Two policemen and the offender himself were injured.
description_en: 🤯A man detonated a grenade during a document check in the Odessa region. The police report that they stopped the moped driver for violating the traffic rules, and during the check they found out that he is in the SZH. After that, the man took out a grenade and began to threaten, and after a few moments an explosion thundered. Two policemen and the offender himself were injured.
description_uk: 🤯Мужик подорвал гранату во время проверки документов в Одесской области Полицейские сообщают, что остановили водителя мопеда за нарушение ПДД, а во время проверки выяснили, что он находится в СЗЧ. После этого мужчина достал гранату и начал угрожать, а уже через несколько мгновений прогремел взрыв. Двое полицейских и сам нарушитель получили ранения.

description_uk: Уражено аеродром у Криму, склади боєприпасів та мости ⚡️У ніч на 5 липня в рамках зниження наступального потенціалу російського агресора підрозділи Сил оборони України уразили аеродром "Гвардійське" у тимчасово окупованому Криму. Ступінь завданих збитків уточнюється. Аеродром "Гвардійське" є одним із ключових військових аеродромів російської федерації на тимчасово окупованому Кримському...

description: Dear servicemen, workers and veterans of the Naval Forces of the Armed Forces of Ukraine! I sincerely congratulate you on the professional holiday of military sailors! Ukraine was, is and will be a maritime state. Today, the soldiers of our Naval Forces defend this right every day with weapons in their hands. From the beginning of the large-scale aggression, Russia sought to deprive Ukraine of access to the sea, destroy our fleet and establish...
description_en: Dear servicemen, workers and veterans of the Naval Forces of the Armed Forces of Ukraine! I sincerely congratulate you on the professional holiday of military sailors! Ukraine was, is and will be a maritime state. Today, the soldiers of our Naval Forces defend this right every day with weapons in their hands. From the beginning of the large-scale aggression, Russia sought to deprive Ukraine of access to the sea, destroy our fleet and establish...

Україна була, є і буде морською державою. Сьогодні це право щодня зі зброєю в руках відстоюють воїни наших Військово-Морських Сил. Від початку широкомасштабної агресії росія прагнула позбавити Україну виходу до моря, знищити наш флот і встановити...

title: 🇸The USA celebrated the 250th anniversary of independence on a grand...
title_en: 🇸The USA celebrated the 250th anniversary of independence on a grand...
title_uk: 🇸США відзначили 250-ту річницю незалежності грандіозним...
description: 🇸The USA celebrated the 250th anniversary of independence on a grand scale Washington staged the largest fireworks display in the history of the country - the organizers announced 850 thousand pyrotechnic charges and more than 40 minutes of continuous show. In New York, however, they overdid it: there, festive fireworks set fire to the Brooklyn Bridge. The holiday took place against the background of record heat: in Washington, the temperature rose to +38.3°C. Due to...
description_en: 🇸The USA celebrated the 250th anniversary of independence on a grand scale Washington staged the largest fireworks display in the history of the country - the organizers announced 850 thousand pyrotechnic charges and more than 40 minutes of continuous show. In New York, however, they overdid it: there, festive fireworks set fire to the Brooklyn Bridge. The holiday took place against the background of record heat: in Washington, the temperature rose to +38.3°C. Due to...
description_uk: 🇸США отпраздновали 250-летие независимости с размахом В Вашингтоне устроили самый масштабный салют в истории страны — организаторы заявили о 850 тысячах пиротехнических зарядов и более чем 40 минутах непрерывного шоу. В Нью-Йорке, правда, перестарались: там праздничный фейерверк поджег Бруклинский мост. Праздник прошел на фоне рекордной жары: в Вашингтоне температура поднялась до +38,3°C. Из-за...

title: Clouds thicken over occupied Crimea: Defense forces hit two more...
title_en: Clouds thicken over occupied Crimea: Defense forces hit two more...
title_uk: Над окупованим Кримом згущуються хмари: Сили вдарили ще по двох...
description: Clouds thicken over occupied Crimea: Defense forces hit two more substations Preliminary, this night "Bakhchisarai" 220 kV and "Zymino" 110/35/10 kV were hit. The last video shows a comparison of satellite images for July 2025 and July this year. Night lighting in Crimea has become noticeably less.
description_en: Clouds thicken over occupied Crimea: Defense forces hit two more substations Preliminary, this night "Bakhchisarai" 220 kV and "Zymino" 110/35/10 kV were hit. The last video shows a comparison of satellite images for July 2025 and July this year. Night lighting in Crimea has become noticeably less.
description_uk: Сгущаются тучи над оккупированным Крымом: Силы обороны поразили еще две подстанции Предварительно, этой ночью под удар попали «Бахчисарай» 220 кВ и «Зимино» 110/35/10 кВ. На последнем видео — сравнение спутниковых снимков за июль 2025 и июль этого года. Ночного освещения в Крыму стало заметно меньше.

title: Kyiv: 31 killed, 102 injured
title_en: Kyiv: 31 killed, 102 injured
title_uk: Київ: 31 загинув, 102 поранені
description: Update: Search and rescue operations end in Kyiv with 31 dead, 102 injured. Search and rescue operations at the site of a Russian strike on a residential building in Kyiv's Darnytskyi district concluded on July 4, Ukraine's State Emergency Service (DSNS) said. The death toll from Russia's July 2 mass attack on the capital rose to 31, with 102 people reported injured.
description_en: Update: Search and rescue operations end in Kyiv with 31 dead, 102 injured. Search and rescue operations at the site of a Russian strike on a residential building in Kyiv's Darnytskyi district concluded on July 4, Ukraine's State Emergency Service (DSNS) said. The death toll from Russia's July 2 mass attack on the capital rose to 31, with 102 people reported injured.
description_uk: Update: Search and rescue operations end in Kyiv with 31 dead, 102 injured. Search and rescue operations at the site of a Russian strike on a residential building in Kyiv's Darnytskyi district concluded on July 4, Ukraine's State Emergency Service (DSNS) said. The death toll from Russia's July 2 mass attack on the capital rose to 31, with 102 people reported injured.

title_uk: Київ: Кремль пропонує тимчасове припинення вогню в Костянтинівці та передачу...
description: Kremlin proposes temporary Kostiantynivka ceasefire and handover of bodies to Ukraine, calls for talks in Moscow. Russia proposed a temporary ceasefire in the front-line city of Kostiantynivka to facilitate a handover of fallen Ukrainian service members' bodies, and the Kremlin said that President Volodymyr Zelensky should travel to Moscow for talks with Russian President Vladimir Putin instead...
description_en: Kremlin proposes temporary Kostiantynivka ceasefire and handover of bodies to Ukraine, calls for talks in Moscow. Russia proposed a temporary ceasefire in the front-line city of Kostiantynivka to facilitate a handover of fallen Ukrainian service members' bodies, and the Kremlin said that President Volodymyr Zelensky should travel to Moscow for talks with Russian President Vladimir Putin instead...

title: Mykolaiv: I visited our soldiers in Odesa, who are undergoing treatment and...
title_en: Mykolaiv: I visited our soldiers in Odesa, who are undergoing treatment and...
title_uk: Миколаїв: відвідав наших бійців в Одесі, які проходять лікування та...
description: I visited our soldiers in Odesa, who are undergoing treatment and rehabilitation after injuries. He spoke with defenders who fought in Kherson region, Mykolaiv region, Dnipro region, defended the Kinburn spit and the port of Odesa. He honored them with state awards. Thank you everyone for your service and protection of Ukraine. He also spoke with medics who save the lives of our soldiers. They carry out complex operations, provided...
description_en: I visited our soldiers in Odesa, who are undergoing treatment and rehabilitation after injuries. He spoke with defenders who fought in Kherson region, Mykolaiv region, Dnipro region, defended the Kinburn spit and the port of Odesa. He honored them with state awards. Thank you everyone for your service and protection of Ukraine. He also spoke with medics who save the lives of our soldiers. They carry out complex operations, provided...
description_uk: Відвідав в Одесі наших воїнів, які проходять лікування та реабілітацію після поранень. Поспілкувався із захисниками, які воювали на Херсонщині, Миколаївщині, Дніпровщині, захищали Кінбурнську косу та порт Одеси. Відзначив їх державними нагородами. Дякую кожному за службу та захист України. Також говорив з медиками, які рятують життя наших військових. Вони проводять складні операції, надавали...
